title: Enhancing Water Recharge in Arizona
description: NAU researchers joined a tri-university effort to identify where Arizona can capture more water, strengthen recharge, and improve long-term resilience.
imageAlt: A lake surrounded by forested Arizona landscape
impact: Radiant connects geospatial analysis, forest monitoring, and hydrologic science to help identify where land management can improve water recharge. This work supports more resilient aquifers, healthier forests, and better long-term water planning across Arizona.
